title: Fix Error Handling Inconsistencies

tasks.description: Audit and document error handling patterns - Create ERROR_HANDLING.md documenting all custom error types, when to throw vs return null, error message format
Standardize entity not found behavior - Ensure read operations return null/empty, mutation operations throw EntityNotFoundError consistently across EntityManager
acceptanceCriteria: All read operations return null/empty for missing
All mutation operations throw for missing
Update tests to match new behavior

tasks.description: Create centralized error factory - Add factory functions to errors.ts for consistent error creation: entityNotFound(), relationNotFound(), validationFailed(), operationFailed()
acceptanceCriteria: Factory functions for all error types

tasks.description: Add error context to all throws - Ensure all errors include context (operation, input, reason) especially in BooleanSearch query parsing, GraphStorage file I/O, ImportManager parsing
acceptanceCriteria: Error messages are helpful for debugging
No generic Error throws (use custom types)

tasks.description: Add error handling tests - Create comprehensive tests validating error behavior for EntityNotFoundError, ValidationError, read operations returning null, mutation operations throwing
testCases: EntityNotFoundError should be thrown for mutations on missing entities
EntityNotFoundError should include entity name in message
ValidationError should include field and reason
Read operations should return null for missing entities
Read operations should return empty array for no matches

successCriteria: Consistent throw vs return null behavior
notes: This sprint standardizes error handling which is currently inconsistent (sometimes throws, sometimes silently skips). The standard is: read operations return null/empty, mutation operations throw. All errors should include context for debugging.
